title: Five Pebbles Sky
description: Rain World Five Pebbles sky in Minecraft
body:
Replaces your overworld sky with the one you can see on top of Five Pebbles in game [Rain World](https://store.steampowered.com/app/312520/Rain_World/). 

Currently includes day, night and dusk variants but doesn't changes Moon or Sun

Requires Optifine to work, should also work with [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

Sky boxes were taken directly from Rain World and have been slightly changed to work in minecraft 3D
